argv: Wide reveal: an empire-red KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer sits centered on a white marble counter in a sunlit kitchen, the mixer head is down and the bowl is locked in place, soft camera push-in, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Close-up: two hands shape a ball of proofed bread dough on a flour-dusted wooden board, the empire-red KitchenAid Artisan mixer is softly out of focus behind, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

A finished round crusty sourdough loaf sits on a cast-iron tray fresh from the oven, steam rising in the warm morning light, hands enter frame and set the tray down on a wooden counter, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

A woman's hand pulls the chrome tilt-head lever of an empire-red KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer and tips the head down, the metal latch settles into place, marble counter background, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Extreme close-up: a soft pale ball of bread dough drops in slow motion into the polished steel mixing bowl of an empire-red KitchenAid Artisan stand mixer, dough lands with a soft squish, tiny puff of flour dust, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Macro shot inside the bowl: the polished steel spiral dough hook rotates slowly, pale dough catches against the bowl wall and folds over itself in smooth rhythmic turns, 50mm full-frame, medium-close framing, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream and charcoal palette with KitchenAid red as the single saturated accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait
Cinematic warm solo piano with subtle string swell, no drums, no percussion, gentle and intimate, slow 70 BPM build with quiet emotional crescendo, breath of A24 domestic warmth
